2603.20131.title: An Agentic Multi-Agent Architecture for Cybersecurity Risk Management
2603.20131.paper_summary: Getting a real cybersecurity risk assessment for a small organization is expensive -- a NIST CSF-aligned engagement runs $15,000 on the low end, takes weeks, and depends on practitioners who are genuinely scarce. Most small companies skip it entirely. We built a six-agent AI system where each agent handles one analytical stage: profiling the organization, mapping assets, analyzing threats, evaluating controls, scoring risks, and generating recommendations. Agents share a persistent context that grows as the assessment proceeds, so later agents build on what earlier ones concluded -- the mechanism that distinguishes this from standard sequential agent pipelines. We tested it on a 15-person HIPAA-covered healthcare company and compared outputs to independent assessments by three CISSP practitioners -- the system agreed with them 85% of the time on severity classifications, covered 92% of identified risks, and finished in under 15 minutes. We then ran 30 repeated single-agent assessments across five synthetic but sector-realistic organizational profiles in healthcare, fintech, manufacturing, retail, and SaaS, comparing a general-purpose Mistral-7B against a domain fine-tuned model. Both completed every run. The fine-tuned model flagged threats the baseline could not see at all: PHI exposure in healthcare, OT/IIoT vulnerabilities in manufacturing, platform-specific risks in retail. The full multi-agent pipeline, however, failed every one of 30 attempts on a Tesla T4 with its 4,096-token default context window -- context capacity, not model quality, turned out to be the binding constraint.
2603.20131.paper_summary_zh: 獲得小型組織的真實網路安全風險評估是昂貴的 -- 一個符合NIST CSF的參與費用低至15,000美元，耗時數週，並且依賴於真正稀缺的從業者。大多數小公司完全跳過這個步驟。我們建立了一個六代理的AI系統，每個代理處理一個分析階段：對組織進行分析、映射資產、分析威脅、評估控制、打分風險，以及生成建議。代理之間共享一個持續的上下文，這個上下文隨著評估的進行而增長，因此後面的代理建立在前面代理的結論之上 -- 這是與標準的順序代理管道區別的機制。我們在一家有15名員工的HIPAA覆蓋的醫療公司上進行了測試，並將輸出與三位CISSP從業者的獨立評估進行比較 -- 系統在嚴重性分類上與他們的意見一致的比例為85%，涵蓋了92%的識別風險，並且在15分鐘內完成。然後，我們在五個合成但符合行業現實的組織配置中，在醫療、金融科技、製造、零售和SaaS領域進行了30次重複的單代理評估，將通用的Mistral-7B與經過領域微調的模型進行比較。兩者都完成了每一次運行。然而，經過微調的模型標記了基線完全無法看到的威脅：醫療中的PHI暴露、製造中的OT/IIoT漏洞、零售中的平台特定風險。然而，完整的多代理管道在一台擁有4,096個標記的默認上下文窗口的Tesla T4上失敗了30次嘗試 -- 上下文容量，而不是模型質量，最終成為了限制因素。
2603.20131.author: Ravish Gupta et.al.
2603.20131.authors: Ravish Gupta, Saket Kumar, Shreeya Sharma, Maulik Dang, Abhishek Aggarwal
